description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-jdk-10-slim Docker image. Define a single build job named build that runs in the default stage, executes java -version, mvn -v, mvn -B clean package, removes any original-*.jar files in target with rm target/original-*.jar && true, and copies the resulting *.jar files from target to the project root with cp target/*.jar ./. The job archives all generated *.jar files as artifacts and has no caches, services, variables, or conditional rules.
